pages.text: News [2023-05-17] We (Binggui Zhou, Kehui Li, Chengzhi Ma, Chengwang Ji, and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Winning Prize of the First 6G Intelligent Wireless Communication System Competition hosted by the IMT-2030(6G) Promotion Group and Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd. [2022-04-24] We (Binggui Zhou and Prof. Shaodan Ma) won the Silver Prize of the First 6G AI Competition hosted by the Guangdong OPPO Mobile Communications Corp., Ltd.

Hi there, this is Binggui Zhou 👋 🏫 I’m currently a Ph.D. student in Electrical and Computer Engineering (ECE) with the University of Macau … 🔭 I’m working on Artifical Intelligence, Wireless Communications, and Smart Healthcare …
